mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_audit_log ( tenant_id, entity_name, entity_id, action_type, before_json, after_json, actor_user_id, acted_at, ip_address, reason_code, approval_request_id, trace_id ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{entityName}, #{entityId}, #{actionType}, #{beforeJson}, #{afterJson}, #{actorUserId}, NOW(), #{ipAddress}, #{reasonCode}, #{approvalRequestId}, #{traceId} )
